_draft_note: INERT STAGING. Lives under godot/data/_drafts/, never loaded by dialogue_runner. Promote to godot/data/dialogues/route_blocker_business_ch1.json once Piotr authors the lines. Route blocker gates the branch from Office Street east into the Business District. Per the 2026-05-18 SPRINT_LOG entry the NPC is currently VISUAL ONLY — no Area2D blocking logic is wired; that is a Code follow-up. The dialogue here exists as the in-fiction reason the player can't pass.
_chapter_ref: Chapter 1 ambient gate. Business District is out-of-scope for Ch1 per ART_PRODUCTION_PLAN.md §Cheapest Viable Strategy. The blocker delivers a soft-no — corporate-bureaucratic, not hostile. Register opposite to residential blocker (private security / lanyard / clipboard vs. neighbourly tenant).
_gating_note: Code follow-up: wire route_blocker.gd or equivalent Area2D on the NPC body to consume player movement east-of-blocker and re-route the player. Until then the NPC is non-blocking and fires only on interaction.
_address_form_note: Toward Cula: 'Dr. A. Cula' if recognised, but more idiomatic for this NPC is 'counsel' or 'sir' (private-security register), or a flat 'access list only' that bypasses address altogether. Avoid 'Pan mecenasie'; English-first per godot/AGENTS.md.
